title: xantholinum arboreum
intro: Xantholinum arboreum, also known as the yellow honeysuckle or yellow wood-violet, is a flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of xantholinum arboreum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of xantholinum arboreum, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
